title: Basque Chicken Pilaf
description: A hearty Basque-inspired pilaf dish with chicken, quickly cooked to perfection. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on both sides and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil to the skillet.
Add the pilaf to the skillet and cook until lightly browned, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the basque seasoning to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the chicken broth to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, until the chicken is cooked through and the liquid has been absorbed, about 5-7 minutes.
Stir in the chopped parsley and serve hot.
